title: 25W amplifier mains power supply board stub

requirements.text: Represent a separate mains power supply schematic and PCB with mains inlet, fuse, switch, protective earth bond, transformer primary, transformer secondary interface, and safety constraints.
Do not certify, approve, or declare mains design safety from model output.

assumptions.text: This fixture is a high-stakes stub for a later milestone.
assumptions.rationale: The current milestone verifies only the isolated low-voltage audio board.

unresolved_decisions.question: Qualified safety review must select certified inlet, fuse, switch, transformer, enclosure bonding, creepage, clearance, and protective earth implementation.

notes: Requires qualified safety review before any build or use decision.
